title: RBI Amends Governance Directions for Rural Co-operative Banks
summary:
• Amends existing RBI governance directions for rural co-operative banks.
• Aims to enhance operational frameworks and oversight standards.
• Mandates compliance with updated institutional integrity norms.
• Strengthens regulatory control and efficiency within rural banking sector.

title: UCB Governance Amendment Directions, 2026
summary:
- Amends existing governance directions for Urban Co-operative Banks (UCBs).
- Introduces updated guidelines concerning operational and administrative structures.
- Aims to strengthen internal controls and board oversight in UCBs.
- Requires UCBs to comply with revised standards by specified deadlines.

title: UAPA 51A: Removal of 7 Entities from UNSC ISIL/Al-Qaida Sanctions List
summary: RBI mandates compliance with UAPA, 1967, Section 51A. The UNSC's 1267/1989 ISIL (Da'esh) & Al-Qaida Sanctions List has been updated. Seven entities have been removed. Banks must promptly update their records, ensuring no accounts of these de-listed entities remain frozen as per anti-money laundering and counter-terrorism financing guidelines.

title: Local Area Banks: Financial Statements & Disclosures Amendment 2026
summary: Amends existing directions for Local Area Banks (LABs).
Updates requirements for financial statement presentation and disclosures.
Mandates LABs to comply with revised reporting norms.
Aims to enhance transparency and standardization in financial reporting.

title: Amendments to Financial Statements and Disclosures for Commercial Banks
summary:
- Introduces the Sixth Amendment to RBI directions on commercial banks' financial statements.
- Updates presentation and disclosure norms for banks' financial reporting.
- Mandates compliance for all commercial banks, impacting their annual reports.
- Aims to enhance transparency and standardization in bank financial reporting.

title: RBI Amends Capital Adequacy Norms for Commercial Banks
summary: This notification introduces the sixth amendment to prudential norms on capital adequacy for commercial banks. It updates the regulatory framework to enhance financial stability and resilience within the banking sector. Banks are required to adhere to the revised capital ratios and regulatory guidelines to strengthen their risk management frameworks and ensure compliance with the latest directives.

title: Updated Investment Portfolio Norms for Regional Rural Banks (RRBs)
summary:
- Amends RBI directions for Regional Rural Banks (RRBs).
- Updates guidelines on classification, valuation, and operation of investment portfolios.
- Aims to enhance risk management and financial stability for RRBs.
- Mandatory compliance for all RRBs.

title: RBI Directions: Investment Portfolio for Rural Co-operative Banks
summary: Amends investment portfolio guidelines for Rural Co-operative Banks. Covers revised rules for classification, valuation, and operational management. Aims to enhance regulatory compliance and portfolio performance. Banks must integrate updated directives for their investment activities.

title: RBI Amendments for UCB Investment Portfolio (2026)
summary:
• Amends directions for Urban Co-operative Banks (UCBs).
• Focuses on classification, valuation, and operation of their investment portfolios.
• Aims to enhance risk management and financial stability for UCBs.
• UCBs must comply with new guidelines for investment management.

title: RBI Investment Portfolio Norms for Local Area Banks
summary: Amends directions for Local Area Banks (LABs) on managing investment portfolios. Covers classification (e.g., HTM, AFS), valuation, and operational aspects. Aims to enhance risk management, transparency, and reporting standards. Requires compliance with revised norms for investment operations.
